title: Threat Heatmap Pathfinding
description: Enhance A* navigation by overlaying a dynamic threat heatmap based on enemy DPS and attack ranges. Instead of finding the shortest path, A* will minimize a 'danger cost' function. Technical implementation involves creating a new helper method `_find_path` or modifying obstacle avoidance in `src/ai/action.py` to evaluate nodes using a new `danger_coefficient` grid maintained by the Arena state.
